name: Amcache — Application Execution Inventory
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Amcache.hve is a registry hive (not part of the main registry) tracking application execution and installation history. Root\File (legacy Win8/10) and Root\InventoryApplication*/File (modern) record SHA1 hashes, binary metadata, and first execution timestamps for every executed program.
forensic_value: SHA1 hashes in Amcache can be matched against threat intelligence even after file deletion. First execution timestamp is the most reliable execution time artifact (unlike Prefetch which may be updated). Root\InventoryDriverBinary provides driver execution history. Parse with AmcacheParser (Eric Zimmerman) for full structured output.
